hero.description: CREATION PLATFORM, LIVING ARCHIVE AND DIGITAL SHOWCASE FOR THE ART OF TOMORROW.

what_to_do.title: ACTIVATIONS
what_to_do.subtitle: What can you do in the Core?
what_to_do.item1_desc: Spaces for technical and conceptual experimentation with cutting-edge tools.
what_to_do.item2_desc: Living memory of artistic and technological processes developed by the collective.
what_to_do.item3_desc: An expanded network of creative nodes inhabiting the art-tech intersection.
what_to_do.item4_desc: Creative machine to activate innovation missions and disruptive thinking.

who_is_it_for.title: FOR WHOM
who_is_it_for.subtitle: Connecting different nodes of the ecosystem
who_is_it_for.p1: We articulate dialogues between academia, industry and territory to generate real impact.
who_is_it_for.item1_desc: Seeking to expand their practice through code, AI and new media.
who_is_it_for.item2_desc: Requiring disruptive creative solutions and immersive experiences.
who_is_it_for.item3_desc: Anyone interested in the future of culture and technology.

community_cta.subtitle: Open Call
community_cta.desc: WE ARE LOOKING FOR NEW NODES TO INVENT THE FUTURE.

strategic_challenge.title: STRATEGIC CHALLENGE
strategic_challenge.description: Creation missions designed for teams and organizations.

creative_machine.title: CREATIVE MACHINE

manifesto.title: Manifesto
manifesto.subtitle: Towards a future of art and technology
manifesto.p1: Núcleo Colectivo is a creative laboratory, living archive, and digital showcase designed to invent the future of art and culture from the intersection of technology, artificial intelligence, and critical thinking.
manifesto.p2: We believe in technology as an extension of human sensitivity, not its replacement.
manifesto.p3: We articulate dialogues between academia, industry and territory.
manifesto.p4: We seek to generate a real impact in the Medellín community, fostering co-creation and technical knowledge exchange.
manifesto.p6: We explore the cultural grammars that emerge from programming and data visualization.
manifesto.li2: Living archive of technical and artistic processes.
manifesto.p8: We operate as an expanded network of creators, where each node brings a unique vision to the system.
manifesto.p9: Our aesthetic is defined as Organic Technical Brutalism: rigor in the system, fluidity in the experience.
manifesto.p10: Collective artificial intelligence is our tool to democratize creation.
manifesto.p11: We invent the future from the Global South, with our own narratives and an authentic voice.

ia.section_3_obj_general_text: Integrate Artificial Intelligence as a creative collaborator in research and artistic production processes.
section_3_obj_specific_list: Understand the ethical and technical foundations of generative AI.
Develop custom workflows with cutting-edge tools.
Prototype projects integrating image, sound, and code.
Foster critical thinking on AI's impact on culture.

manuel.name: Manuel Palacio
manuel.primary_roles: Founder | Artist + Graphic Designer + AI Digital Creator
manuel.bio_intro: Integrates visual creativity with new technologies, exploring image-sound relationships.
manuel.bio: Graphic designer and visual artist. His practice inhabits the intersection of nature and code, specializing in immersive installations and generative systems.

carlos.name: Carlos Andrés Londoño Ruiz
carlos.bio_intro: Audiovisual producer with over 15 years of experience, exploring transmedia narratives.
carlos.bio: Specialist in integrating AI to create impossible visual worlds. His work focuses on memory, territory, and digital experimentation.

maria-cecilia.name: María Cecilia Castaño
maria-cecilia.bio_intro: Articulates dialogues between science, communication, and art for collective well-being.
maria-cecilia.bio: Strategic management of cultural projects. Biologist focused on territory conservation and communicator expert in co-creation methodologies.
